# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- For this app UI, the user prefers compact numeric inputs and gray default text/placeholder styling for consistency.
- User values simple visual behavior and expects chart data to remain readable for max range without dense zero-filled rendering.
- User prefers using DatabaseSeed-based seeding for both debug and release rather than bundled debug database flow, favoring simpler, minimal implementation over extra tooling/complexity for debug data seeding.
